title: Alsinella stricta
taxonomy: Alsinella stricta is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It belongs to the genus Alsinella, which is a group of plants commonly known as 'sticky willowherbs'. The family Primulaceae comprises a wide variety of plants, often shrubs or perennials with showy flowers. Alsinella stricta is native to certain regions, with a distribution that is typically limited to specific habitats. The classification of Alsinella stricta reflects its unique characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
